'''pagozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantionymy|enantionymy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantionymy|enantionymy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pagozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pægezeth|pægezeth]] || [[word:pægezej|pægezej]] || [[word:pægezesh|pægezesh]] || [[word:pægeze|pægeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pagogozoth|pagogozoth]] || [[word:pagogozoj|pagogozoj]] || [[word:pagogozosh|pagogozosh]] || [[word:pagogozo|pagogozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pagozoth|pagozoth]] || [[word:pagozoj|pagozoj]] || [[word:pagozosh|pagozosh]] || [[word:pagozo|pagozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pagofzoth|pagofzoth]] || [[word:pagofzoj|pagofzoj]] || [[word:pagofzosh|pagofzosh]] || [[word:pagofzof|pagofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pagozotho|pagozotho]] || [[word:pagozojo|pagozojo]] || [[word:pagozosho|pagozosho]] || [[word:pagozoko|pagozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pagozoth|pagozoth]] || [[word:pagozoj|pagozoj]] || [[word:pagozosh|pagozosh]] || [[word:pagozo|pagozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pagozothol|pagozothol]] || [[word:pagozojol|pagozojol]] || [[word:pagozoshol|pagozoshol]] || [[word:pagozokol|pagozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pagozothotho|pagozothotho]] || [[word:pagozojojo|pagozojojo]] || [[word:pagozoshosho|pagozoshosho]] || [[word:pagozoko|pagozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pagozothon|pagozothon]] || [[word:pagozojon|pagozojon]] || [[word:pagozoshon|pagozoshon]] || [[word:pagozokon|pagozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pagozothoro|pagozothoro]] || [[word:pagozojoro|pagozojoro]] || [[word:pagozoshoro|pagozoshoro]] || [[word:pagozokoro|pagozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
